creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #74)
>    * The qt4-moc patch has not yet been committed.

I was told in comment #50 that you guys would like an exp-run for this change, and in comment #53 it was indicated you guys would prefer to test it with the rest of the required changes instead of landing this separately and before the rest.

>    * I'm looking into the FreeBSD 9.x issues.  I'm currently
>      testing a patch to boost to fix databases/akonadi.

I'm waiting for replies to my comment in bug 207600. Please keep kde@ in the loop for changes in akonadi.
